# Agents — .github

## Purpose

GitHub metadata for the COGANT repo: [CODEOWNERS](CODEOWNERS), [pull_request_template.md](pull_request_template.md), and [workflows/](workflows/) CI definitions.

## Coordination

- CI behavior is documented in [`../cogant/docs/CI.md`](../cogant/docs/CI.md).
- Workflow files: `ci.yml`, `docs.yml`, `perf-smoke.yml` (see [workflows/AGENTS.md](workflows/AGENTS.md)).
